a:r.a:t: Continuous Naval Assurance adds value only when certified authority, provenance and scope boundaries stay explicit
Pilot one E3D/Hull scenario; adapters orchestrate solvers instead of rewriting them.
Certified solver remains source of truth; immutable provenance and human/class release.
Seeded truth cases validate hull, compartment, weight, loading case and rule links.
AI proposes and explains only; OIDC/RBAC, signed evidence and full audit trail.
Naval architect, engineering, IT and planning jointly own pilot and KPI decisions.
